visual_description: A close-up, profile shot shows a man with short, dark hair in a white collared shirt. He has a serious expression as he looks off-camera to the left. The background is a blurry, cool-toned interior. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The camera remains steady, focusing on the man's face. A man speaks in a calm and slightly apologetic tone, saying, "Excuse me, I have to work overtime tonight." His voice is steady and polite. The man turns and walks out of the frame to the left. The camera holds on the empty, blurry background for a moment before the scene cuts. The "风行网" text remains on screen. The scene transitions to a dark, nighttime view of a city street. The camera is shaky, capturing the bright, colorful lights of neon signs and traffic from a low angle. The "风行网" text is still present in the top left corner. The audio then cuts to a loud, jarring, and dramatic sound effect, like a sudden, percussive impact, creating a sense of shock and suspense.
